[bin/test] uv sync failed — CodeArtifact returned 401 and silent recovery couldn't fix it.

This usually means your AWS SSO session has expired. Run:
    bin/aws-sso && bin/setup

If that doesn't resolve it, check:
  - aws sts get-caller-identity --profile arqu-codeartifact succeeds
  - You have CodeArtifact read access on the 'arqu' domain

Original uv error above.
